commands.name: list-devices
commands.title: Devices
commands.subtitle: AirBuddy
commands.description: Browse nearby devices, batteries, and connection state.

commands.name: connect-nearest-headset
commands.title: Connect Nearest Headset
commands.subtitle: AirBuddy
commands.description: Connect to the headset AirBuddy considers closest.

commands.name: connect-favorite-headset
commands.title: Connect Favorite Headset
commands.subtitle: AirBuddy
commands.description: Connect to the headset starred as a favorite in AirBuddy.

commands.name: toggle-listening-mode
commands.title: Toggle Listening Mode
commands.subtitle: AirBuddy
commands.description: Cycle the listening mode on the current headset.

commands.name: set-listening-mode
commands.title: Set Listening Mode
commands.subtitle: AirBuddy
commands.description: Set a specific listening mode on the current headset.

commands.name: toggle-spatial-audio
commands.title: Toggle Spatial Audio
commands.subtitle: AirBuddy
commands.description: Toggle Spatial Audio on the current output device.

commands.name: toggle-microphone-input
commands.title: Toggle Microphone Input
commands.subtitle: AirBuddy
commands.description: Toggle microphone input routing for the currently connected headset.

commands.name: toggle-audio-input-lock
commands.title: Toggle Audio Input Lock
commands.subtitle: AirBuddy
commands.description: Toggle AirBuddy's Audio Input Lock setting.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
